summary.goal: Remove synchronize trigger from memex-check.yml so the CI job runs against the full PR once rather than on every commit push
decisions: removed synchronize from trigger types; the three-dot diff already checks the full PR so re-running on every push was noise

rejected_approaches.description: Keep synchronize but skip if node already exists
rejected_approaches.reason: Would require stateful artifact caching across runs; overkill for what is a PR-level structural check
